zh.lifeSummary: 當Hannah Root於1662年1月9日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼哈普爾諾薩普頓時，她的父親Joseph Root22歲，母親Hannah Haynes25歲。她於1682年12月27日與John Hutchinson在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼哈普爾諾薩普頓結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1739年11月2日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州文達哈姆享年77歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hannah Root于1662年1月9日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼哈普爾諾薩普頓时，她的父亲Joseph Root22岁，母亲Hannah Haynes25岁。她于1682年12月27日与John Hutchinson在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼哈普爾諾薩普頓结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1739年11月2日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州文達哈姆享年77岁。

nameMeanings.name: Root
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: perhaps a nickname for a cheerful person, from an unrecorded Middle English rote (Old English rōt) ‘glad, cheerful’.

English: from Middle English rote, route, rotte ‘rote’ (of uncertain origin but apparently ultimately akin to Welsh crwth), perhaps used for a player of the medieval stringed instrument, a kind of harp or fiddle. Compare Rutter .
English: perhaps a habitational name from Wroot (Lincolnshire), from Old English wrōt ‘snout, spur of land’.

variants.name: Rooth
meanings: English: habitational name from Rowarth in New Mills (Derbyshire), from Old English rūh ‘rough’ + worth ‘enclosure’.

variants.name: Rutter
meanings: English: occupational name from Old French roteor, roteeur, routeeur ‘player on the rote’, a musical instrument, a kind of harp or fiddle. The regular modern development of the name would have been to Roter (rhyming with boater), and to Router or Rowter (rhyming with doubter). These variants survive in small numbers, but the principal modern form is Rutter, found in fairly large numbers across England, especially in the northeast and in the West Midlands. The shortened vowel in Rutter may have been influenced by rotte, rutte, Middle English variants of Old French rote. Compare Root 2.

English: nickname from Middle English roter, rotour ‘robber, plunderer’, also ‘scoundrel, lecher’, a borrowing of Old French rotier, Anglo-Norman French routier ‘soldier of fortune; robber, highwayman, ruffian’, though this is a less likely source of the modern surname.
Dutch: nickname from Middle Dutch rut(t)er ‘freebooter, footpad’, cognate with 2 above.

variants.name: Rutt
meanings: English: probably a variant of   Root  .
German (Rütt): from a short form of the personal name Rudolf .

variants.name: Roots
meanings: English (Kent): variant of Root , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

nameMeanings.name: Hannah
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, borne by the mother of the prophet Samuel (1 Samuel 1:2), Hebrew Hanna. It is derived from a Hebrew word meaning ‘He (i.e. God) has favoured me (i.e. with a child)’. See also Anne . This form of the name was taken up as a given name by the Puritans in the 16th and 17th centuries and remained popular until the late 19th century. Thereafter it fell somewhat from favour but has enjoyed a massive revival since the 1990s.

variants.name: Hanna
meanings: Either the biblical name ( see Hannah ) or a short form of Johanna .

variants.name: Hana
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

historicEvents.description: Windham County was created from Hartford and New London counties on May 12, 1726

en.lifeSummary: When Hannah Root was born on 9 January 1662, in Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, her father, Joseph Root, was 22 and her mother, Hannah Haynes, was 25. She married John Hutchinson on 27 December 1682, in Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 2 November 1739, in Windham, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 77.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hannah Root est née le 9 janvier 1662, à Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, Joseph Root, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Hannah Haynes, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé John Hutchinson le 27 décembre 1682, à Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 2 novembre 1739, à Windham, Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 77 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hannah Root am 9. Januar 1662 in Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Joseph Root 22 und ihre Mutter Hannah Haynes 25. Sie hat am 27. Dezember 1682 in Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America John Hutchinson geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 2. November 1739 im Alter von 77 Jahren in Windham, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hannah Root è nata il il 9 gennaio 1662 nel Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, sua padre, Joseph Root, aveva 22 anni e sua madre, Hannah Haynes, aveva 25 anni. Lei sposato John Hutchinson il 27 dicembre 1682, nel Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 2 novembre 1739, nel Windham, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 77 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Hannah Rootが1662年1月9日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーハンプシュアイアノーサンプトンで生まれた時，父Joseph Rootは22歳，母Hannah Haynesは25歳であった。1682年12月27日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーハンプシュアイアノーサンプトンでJohn Hutchinsonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1739年11月2日にイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ウィンドハムで77歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Hannah Root(이)가 1662년 1월 9일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 함프실르 노르섬프턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Joseph Root(은)는 22세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Hannah Haynes(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 1682년 12월 27일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 함프실르 노르섬프턴에서 John Hutchinson(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1739년 11월 2일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 윈드함에서 77세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hannah Root nasceu em 9 de janeiro de 1662, em Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, seu pai, Joseph Root, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Hannah Haynes, tinha 25 anos. Ela casou-se com John Hutchinson em 27 de dezembro de 1682, em Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 2 de novembro de 1739, em Windham, Conecticute, British Colonial America, com 77 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hannah Root родилась 9 января 1662 г. в местности нортамптон, хампшир, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика, её отцу по имени Joseph Root было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Hannah Haynes, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Hutchinson 27 декабря 1682 г. в местности нортамптон, хампшир, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она умерла 2 ноября 1739 г. в местности виндхам, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 77 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hannah Root nació el 9 de enero de 1662, en Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, su papá, Joseph Root, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Hannah Haynes, tenía 25 años. Se casó con John Hutchinson el 27 de diciembre de 1682, en Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 2 de noviembre de 1739, en Windham, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 77 años.
